content.text:
Status update: Executor has not completed the pricing runs yet.

What I checked:
- @Cornerstone/Tesla/2026 — status = Draft, lastModified = 2026-02-20T07:53:17.343Z. No run results (no AggregatedTSI or TotalLocations fields present).
- @Cornerstone/Nestle/2026 — status = Draft, lastModified = 2026-02-20T07:53:17.337Z. No run results present.

What happened:
- I delegated the run request to the Executor because there is no InsuranceAgent. The Executor hasn’t returned results or updated the pricing nodes.

Next actions (pick one):
- I can re-send the run request to Executor now.
- Or I can ask you for parameters (e.g., allow creating new pricings, specific underwriting year, run options).
- Or I can display the two pricing nodes for you to review visually.

Which would you like me to do?
